name: Creamy Creole Turkey Bake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups turkey light meat, skinless, cooked and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare an 8-inch square baking pan with cooking spray; set aside.
3. In a skillet over medium heat, cook mushrooms, onions, celery, bell peppers, and garlic in oil until all is tender.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, crushed tomatoes, and Creole seasoning.
5. Fold in the vegetable mixture, cooked fettucine, and turkey.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
7. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese.
8. Bake for 30 minutes or until bubbly.
